records.m_Talk_ENG: Phew, that was close.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Phew, that was close.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Phew, that was close.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Quiet. It doesn't seem to be following us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Quiet. It doesn't seem to be following us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Quiet. It doesn't seem to be following us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huah! I've never had my heart race this fast in a while.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huah! I've never had my heart race this fast in a while.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huah! I've never had my heart race this fast in a while.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What was that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What was that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What was that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A Category 4 C.O. Eater...
records.m_Talk_DEU: A Category 4 C.O. Eater...
records.m_Talk_FRA: A Category 4 C.O. Eater...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's an entity with a special sensory organ that can detect CRF used by Counters from afar.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's an entity with a special sensory organ that can detect CRF used by Counters from afar.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's an entity with a special sensory organ that can detect CRF used by Counters from afar.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? Then it showed up because Hicks used her powers?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? Then it showed up because Hicks used her powers?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? Then it showed up because Hicks used her powers?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is that why?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is that why?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is that why?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry, Spencer! I didn't think I'd put the whole team at risk!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry, Spencer! I didn't think I'd put the whole team at risk!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry, Spencer! I didn't think I'd put the whole team at risk!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Calm down. If it weren't for you, we would've been dinner for those Category 1s.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Calm down. If it weren't for you, we would've been dinner for those Category 1s.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Calm down. If it weren't for you, we would've been dinner for those Category 1s.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That thing won't be leaving this facility for a while, so just watch out.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That thing won't be leaving this facility for a while, so just watch out.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That thing won't be leaving this facility for a while, so just watch out.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I... don't have to be punished?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I... don't have to be punished?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I... don't have to be punished?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, now. We're all safe and sound, so it's all good.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, now. We're all safe and sound, so it's all good.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, now. We're all safe and sound, so it's all good.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Good thing Captain's alive too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Good thing Captain's alive too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Good thing Captain's alive too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought you were dead for sure when you fell off that cliff.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought you were dead for sure when you fell off that cliff.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought you were dead for sure when you fell off that cliff.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry for the trouble.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry for the trouble.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry for the trouble.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How did you run into those C.O.s?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How did you run into those C.O.s?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How did you run into those C.O.s?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We ran into them while heading to the medical wing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We ran into them while heading to the medical wing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We ran into them while heading to the medical wing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The place was crawling with C.O.s. Must be because of all the Eternium there.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The place was crawling with C.O.s. Must be because of all the Eternium there.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The place was crawling with C.O.s. Must be because of all the Eternium there.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you encountered C.O.s there, it's unlikely the intruder's there.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you encountered C.O.s there, it's unlikely the intruder's there.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you encountered C.O.s there, it's unlikely the intruder's there.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Best we explore elsewhere first.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Best we explore elsewhere first.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Best we explore elsewhere first.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, also...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, also...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, also...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The elevator's out of order. We should secure another way back first.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The elevator's out of order. We should secure another way back first.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The elevator's out of order. We should secure another way back first.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A distortion filter should be running at the basepoint. But the C.O.s found it anyway?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A distortion filter should be running at the basepoint. But the C.O.s found it anyway?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A distortion filter should be running at the basepoint. But the C.O.s found it anyway?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Umm... The thing is... It wasn't the C.O.s. Giallo shot the control panel.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Umm... The thing is... It wasn't the C.O.s. Giallo shot the control panel.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Umm... The thing is... It wasn't the C.O.s. Giallo shot the control panel.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A dead man... shot the panel?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A dead man... shot the panel?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A dead man... shot the panel?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. A corpse cut our lifeline. Ridiculous.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. A corpse cut our lifeline. Ridiculous.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. A corpse cut our lifeline. Ridiculous.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I guess that's the Counterside for you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I guess that's the Counterside for you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I guess that's the Counterside for you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We found the missing advance party below.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We found the missing advance party below.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We found the missing advance party below.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Since we achieved our first objective, we should return and regroup.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Since we achieved our first objective, we should return and regroup.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Since we achieved our first objective, we should return and regroup.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We happened to find a Diving Bell. It's an older model, but it's in working order.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We happened to find a Diving Bell. It's an older model, but it's in working order.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We happened to find a Diving Bell. It's an older model, but it's in working order.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The problem is that we need Eternium. But if this is a medical facility, there must be some stored for treatment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The problem is that we need Eternium. But if this is a medical facility, there must be some stored for treatment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The problem is that we need Eternium. But if this is a medical facility, there must be some stored for treatment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Got it. Let's give it a try then.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Got it. Let's give it a try then.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Got it. Let's give it a try then.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's dark. Is there no power here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's dark. Is there no power here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's dark. Is there no power here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Careful. There might be dormant C.O.s sensitive to light here, so using flares ought to be safer.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Careful. There might be dormant C.O.s sensitive to light here, so using flares ought to be safer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Careful. There might be dormant C.O.s sensitive to light here, so using flares ought to be safer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aye aye, Captain.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aye aye, Captain.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aye aye, Captain.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...? Feels like there's something ahead...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...? Feels like there's something ahead...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...? Feels like there's something ahead...

records.m_Talk_ENG: What on... earth...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What on... earth...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What on... earth...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Holy jesus! I thought it was a monster.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Holy jesus! I thought it was a monster.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Holy jesus! I thought it was a monster.

records.m_Talk_ENG: An abandoned robot?
records.m_Talk_DEU: An abandoned robot?
records.m_Talk_FRA: An abandoned robot?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hard to gauge how big it is just by looking at it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hard to gauge how big it is just by looking at it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hard to gauge how big it is just by looking at it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It doesn't look like construction equipment. Why would a research facility have such a large robot?
records.m_Talk_DEU: It doesn't look like construction equipment. Why would a research facility have such a large robot?
records.m_Talk_FRA: It doesn't look like construction equipment. Why would a research facility have such a large robot?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The detector's going off?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The detector's going off?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The detector's going off?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Captain, there's no way that Eater thing made it all the way in here, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Captain, there's no way that Eater thing made it all the way in here, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Captain, there's no way that Eater thing made it all the way in here, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No... The Corruption ray readings are different from earlier.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No... The Corruption ray readings are different from earlier.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No... The Corruption ray readings are different from earlier.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's fluctuating too much. It might be malfunctioning.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's fluctuating too much. It might be malfunctioning.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's fluctuating too much. It might be malfunctioning.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Best to turn it off.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Best to turn it off.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Best to turn it off.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Over here, everyone! I found an emergency exit!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Over here, everyone! I found an emergency exit!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Over here, everyone! I found an emergency exit!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We didn't run into a single C.O. on the way here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We didn't run into a single C.O. on the way here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We didn't run into a single C.O. on the way here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Good thing that the place we ran to isn't far from the medical wing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Good thing that the place we ran to isn't far from the medical wing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Good thing that the place we ran to isn't far from the medical wing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Look inside this box. It's filled with top-notch purified Eternium liquid. You wouldn't even see this much in large hospitals.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Look inside this box. It's filled with top-notch purified Eternium liquid. You wouldn't even see this much in large hospitals.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Look inside this box. It's filled with top-notch purified Eternium liquid. You wouldn't even see this much in large hospitals.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We have enough for fuel and then some. Let's pocket the rest.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We have enough for fuel and then some. Let's pocket the rest.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We have enough for fuel and then some. Let's pocket the rest.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's too dangerous.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's too dangerous.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's too dangerous.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Too much Eternium in one place will attract C.O.s.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Too much Eternium in one place will attract C.O.s.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Too much Eternium in one place will attract C.O.s.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. I know.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. I know.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. I know.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But isn't this a bit tempting?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But isn't this a bit tempting?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But isn't this a bit tempting?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Judging by your arms, you seem to like this stuff too, no? Isn't this worth the risk?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Judging by your arms, you seem to like this stuff too, no? Isn't this worth the risk?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Judging by your arms, you seem to like this stuff too, no? Isn't this worth the risk?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Prioritize returning in one piece, Kirk.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Prioritize returning in one piece, Kirk.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Prioritize returning in one piece, Kirk.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's an order.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's an order.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's an order.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, yeah. Copy that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, yeah. Copy that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, yeah. Copy that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Captain.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Captain.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Captain.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's a nice toy you picked up while we weren't around.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's a nice toy you picked up while we weren't around.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's a nice toy you picked up while we weren't around.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You know about this gun, Cuba?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You know about this gun, Cuba?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You know about this gun, Cuba?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's a Chernov rifle that uses large-caliber rounds.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's a Chernov rifle that uses large-caliber rounds.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a Chernov rifle that uses large-caliber rounds.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Since the Great Purification War, only the Northern Union has dealt with such reckless anti-personnel weapons.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Since the Great Purification War, only the Northern Union has dealt with such reckless anti-personnel weapons.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Since the Great Purification War, only the Northern Union has dealt with such reckless anti-personnel weapons.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Northern Union...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Northern Union...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Northern Union...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. And seeing something like that here gives me a pretty good idea of what this place is all about.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. And seeing something like that here gives me a pretty good idea of what this place is all about.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. And seeing something like that here gives me a pretty good idea of what this place is all about.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This place isn't a forward base built by some company during the exploration days.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This place isn't a forward base built by some company during the exploration days.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This place isn't a forward base built by some company during the exploration days.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's one of the many traces of chauvinism established by those treacherous nationalists.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's one of the many traces of chauvinism established by those treacherous nationalists.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's one of the many traces of chauvinism established by those treacherous nationalists.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you know why scientists who believe they're above everyone else all worship the Northern Union?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you know why scientists who believe they're above everyone else all worship the Northern Union?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you know why scientists who believe they're above everyone else all worship the Northern Union?

records.m_Talk_ENG: They're the only organization that helps realize their twisted ideals.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They're the only organization that helps realize their twisted ideals.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They're the only organization that helps realize their twisted ideals.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They have enough money to build experimental bases in a ditch in the Counterside, and the balls to ignore Administration regulations.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They have enough money to build experimental bases in a ditch in the Counterside, and the balls to ignore Administration regulations.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They have enough money to build experimental bases in a ditch in the Counterside, and the balls to ignore Administration regulations.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They conduct not just human experiments, but also experiment on Artifacts and C.O.s, like Scavengers.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They conduct not just human experiments, but also experiment on Artifacts and C.O.s, like Scavengers.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They conduct not just human experiments, but also experiment on Artifacts and C.O.s, like Scavengers.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's a den of rogues who love delving into things prohibited by the Administration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's a den of rogues who love delving into things prohibited by the Administration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a den of rogues who love delving into things prohibited by the Administration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do people who work in those places... receive punishment?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do people who work in those places... receive punishment?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do people who work in those places... receive punishment?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Some are behind bars. Like us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Some are behind bars. Like us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Some are behind bars. Like us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But even if they meet a miserable end, I've never seen anyone regret it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But even if they meet a miserable end, I've never seen anyone regret it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But even if they meet a miserable end, I've never seen anyone regret it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nobody who does that kind of work is sane in the first place.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nobody who does that kind of work is sane in the first place.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Nobody who does that kind of work is sane in the first place.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Looks like you had someone of that sort by your side too, eh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Looks like you had someone of that sort by your side too, eh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Looks like you had someone of that sort by your side too, eh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was once in charge of bodyguarding a scientist called Judas at the Northern Union.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was once in charge of bodyguarding a scientist called Judas at the Northern Union.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was once in charge of bodyguarding a scientist called Judas at the Northern Union.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But even that psycho, who conducted human experiments, loved his daughter more than anything.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But even that psycho, who conducted human experiments, loved his daughter more than anything.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But even that psycho, who conducted human experiments, loved his daughter more than anything.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's funny.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's funny.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's funny.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A human who disregards life... raising a child.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A human who disregards life... raising a child.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A human who disregards life... raising a child.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But when it came down to it, he pulled the trigger without hesitation when his own daughter became a test subject.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But when it came down to it, he pulled the trigger without hesitation when his own daughter became a test subject.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But when it came down to it, he pulled the trigger without hesitation when his own daughter became a test subject.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And then, when he rationalized his actions by saying that it was all part of the experiment, I got sick of it all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And then, when he rationalized his actions by saying that it was all part of the experiment, I got sick of it all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And then, when he rationalized his actions by saying that it was all part of the experiment, I got sick of it all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I heard he went missing recently. I can only hope he ended up in hell.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I heard he went missing recently. I can only hope he ended up in hell.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I heard he went missing recently. I can only hope he ended up in hell.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry for making this hard on you, Diana.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry for making this hard on you, Diana.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry for making this hard on you, Diana.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know how tough it is for our daughter to have an irresponsible father who's always out on business trips and can't even drop by the hospital.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know how tough it is for our daughter to have an irresponsible father who's always out on business trips and can't even drop by the hospital.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know how tough it is for our daughter to have an irresponsible father who's always out on business trips and can't even drop by the hospital.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The project will soon be completed. When I come back, I'll fulfill my duties as a father that I've neglected until now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The project will soon be completed. When I come back, I'll fulfill my duties as a father that I've neglected until now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The project will soon be completed. When I come back, I'll fulfill my duties as a father that I've neglected until now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For the happiness of our family... I'll make sure of it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For the happiness of our family... I'll make sure of it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For the happiness of our family... I'll make sure of it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please, just wait a bit more.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please, just wait a bit more.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please, just wait a bit more.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I hope so too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I hope so too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I hope so too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For a scientist who sacrificed his humanity for his ideals... Hellfire would be fitting.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For a scientist who sacrificed his humanity for his ideals... Hellfire would be fitting.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For a scientist who sacrificed his humanity for his ideals... Hellfire would be fitting.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Phew, that was close.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Phew, that was close.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Phew, that was close.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Quiet. It doesn't seem to be following us.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Quiet. It doesn't seem to be following us.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Quiet. It doesn't seem to be following us.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huah! I've never had my heart race this fast in a while.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huah! I've never had my heart race this fast in a while.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huah! I've never had my heart race this fast in a while.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What was that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What was that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What was that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: A Category 4 C.O. Eater...
root.m_Talk_DEU: A Category 4 C.O. Eater...
root.m_Talk_FRA: A Category 4 C.O. Eater...

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's an entity with a special sensory organ that can detect CRF used by Counters from afar.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's an entity with a special sensory organ that can detect CRF used by Counters from afar.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's an entity with a special sensory organ that can detect CRF used by Counters from afar.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What? Then it showed up because Hicks used her powers?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What? Then it showed up because Hicks used her powers?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What? Then it showed up because Hicks used her powers?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is that why?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is that why?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is that why?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry, Spencer! I didn't think I'd put the whole team at risk!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry, Spencer! I didn't think I'd put the whole team at risk!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry, Spencer! I didn't think I'd put the whole team at risk!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Calm down. If it weren't for you, we would've been dinner for those Category 1s.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Calm down. If it weren't for you, we would've been dinner for those Category 1s.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Calm down. If it weren't for you, we would've been dinner for those Category 1s.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That thing won't be leaving this facility for a while, so just watch out.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That thing won't be leaving this facility for a while, so just watch out.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That thing won't be leaving this facility for a while, so just watch out.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I... don't have to be punished?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I... don't have to be punished?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I... don't have to be punished?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now, now. We're all safe and sound, so it's all good.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now, now. We're all safe and sound, so it's all good.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now, now. We're all safe and sound, so it's all good.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Good thing Captain's alive too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Good thing Captain's alive too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Good thing Captain's alive too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I thought you were dead for sure when you fell off that cliff.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I thought you were dead for sure when you fell off that cliff.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I thought you were dead for sure when you fell off that cliff.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry for the trouble.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry for the trouble.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry for the trouble.

root.m_Talk_ENG: How did you run into those C.O.s?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How did you run into those C.O.s?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How did you run into those C.O.s?

root.m_Talk_ENG: We ran into them while heading to the medical wing.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We ran into them while heading to the medical wing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We ran into them while heading to the medical wing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The place was crawling with C.O.s. Must be because of all the Eternium there.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The place was crawling with C.O.s. Must be because of all the Eternium there.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The place was crawling with C.O.s. Must be because of all the Eternium there.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you encountered C.O.s there, it's unlikely the intruder's there.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you encountered C.O.s there, it's unlikely the intruder's there.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you encountered C.O.s there, it's unlikely the intruder's there.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Best we explore elsewhere first.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Best we explore elsewhere first.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Best we explore elsewhere first.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, also...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, also...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, also...

root.m_Talk_ENG: The elevator's out of order. We should secure another way back first.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The elevator's out of order. We should secure another way back first.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The elevator's out of order. We should secure another way back first.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A distortion filter should be running at the basepoint. But the C.O.s found it anyway?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A distortion filter should be running at the basepoint. But the C.O.s found it anyway?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A distortion filter should be running at the basepoint. But the C.O.s found it anyway?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Umm... The thing is... It wasn't the C.O.s. Giallo shot the control panel.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Umm... The thing is... It wasn't the C.O.s. Giallo shot the control panel.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Umm... The thing is... It wasn't the C.O.s. Giallo shot the control panel.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A dead man... shot the panel?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A dead man... shot the panel?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A dead man... shot the panel?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. A corpse cut our lifeline. Ridiculous.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. A corpse cut our lifeline. Ridiculous.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. A corpse cut our lifeline. Ridiculous.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I guess that's the Counterside for you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I guess that's the Counterside for you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I guess that's the Counterside for you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We found the missing advance party below.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We found the missing advance party below.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We found the missing advance party below.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Since we achieved our first objective, we should return and regroup.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Since we achieved our first objective, we should return and regroup.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Since we achieved our first objective, we should return and regroup.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We happened to find a Diving Bell. It's an older model, but it's in working order.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We happened to find a Diving Bell. It's an older model, but it's in working order.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We happened to find a Diving Bell. It's an older model, but it's in working order.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The problem is that we need Eternium. But if this is a medical facility, there must be some stored for treatment.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The problem is that we need Eternium. But if this is a medical facility, there must be some stored for treatment.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The problem is that we need Eternium. But if this is a medical facility, there must be some stored for treatment.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Got it. Let's give it a try then.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Got it. Let's give it a try then.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Got it. Let's give it a try then.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's dark. Is there no power here?
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's dark. Is there no power here?
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's dark. Is there no power here?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Careful. There might be dormant C.O.s sensitive to light here, so using flares ought to be safer.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Careful. There might be dormant C.O.s sensitive to light here, so using flares ought to be safer.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Careful. There might be dormant C.O.s sensitive to light here, so using flares ought to be safer.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Aye aye, Captain.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Aye aye, Captain.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Aye aye, Captain.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...? Feels like there's something ahead...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...? Feels like there's something ahead...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...? Feels like there's something ahead...

root.m_Talk_ENG: What on... earth...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What on... earth...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What on... earth...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Holy jesus! I thought it was a monster.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Holy jesus! I thought it was a monster.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Holy jesus! I thought it was a monster.

root.m_Talk_ENG: An abandoned robot?
root.m_Talk_DEU: An abandoned robot?
root.m_Talk_FRA: An abandoned robot?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hard to gauge how big it is just by looking at it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hard to gauge how big it is just by looking at it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hard to gauge how big it is just by looking at it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It doesn't look like construction equipment. Why would a research facility have such a large robot?
root.m_Talk_DEU: It doesn't look like construction equipment. Why would a research facility have such a large robot?
root.m_Talk_FRA: It doesn't look like construction equipment. Why would a research facility have such a large robot?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The detector's going off?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: The detector's going off?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: The detector's going off?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Captain, there's no way that Eater thing made it all the way in here, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Captain, there's no way that Eater thing made it all the way in here, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Captain, there's no way that Eater thing made it all the way in here, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No... The Corruption ray readings are different from earlier.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No... The Corruption ray readings are different from earlier.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No... The Corruption ray readings are different from earlier.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's fluctuating too much. It might be malfunctioning.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's fluctuating too much. It might be malfunctioning.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's fluctuating too much. It might be malfunctioning.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Best to turn it off.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Best to turn it off.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Best to turn it off.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Over here, everyone! I found an emergency exit!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Over here, everyone! I found an emergency exit!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Over here, everyone! I found an emergency exit!

root.m_Talk_ENG: We didn't run into a single C.O. on the way here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We didn't run into a single C.O. on the way here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We didn't run into a single C.O. on the way here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Good thing that the place we ran to isn't far from the medical wing.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Good thing that the place we ran to isn't far from the medical wing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Good thing that the place we ran to isn't far from the medical wing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Look inside this box. It's filled with top-notch purified Eternium liquid. You wouldn't even see this much in large hospitals.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Look inside this box. It's filled with top-notch purified Eternium liquid. You wouldn't even see this much in large hospitals.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Look inside this box. It's filled with top-notch purified Eternium liquid. You wouldn't even see this much in large hospitals.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We have enough for fuel and then some. Let's pocket the rest.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We have enough for fuel and then some. Let's pocket the rest.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We have enough for fuel and then some. Let's pocket the rest.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's too dangerous.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's too dangerous.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's too dangerous.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Too much Eternium in one place will attract C.O.s.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Too much Eternium in one place will attract C.O.s.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Too much Eternium in one place will attract C.O.s.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. I know.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. I know.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. I know.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But isn't this a bit tempting?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But isn't this a bit tempting?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But isn't this a bit tempting?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Judging by your arms, you seem to like this stuff too, no? Isn't this worth the risk?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Judging by your arms, you seem to like this stuff too, no? Isn't this worth the risk?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Judging by your arms, you seem to like this stuff too, no? Isn't this worth the risk?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Prioritize returning in one piece, Kirk.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Prioritize returning in one piece, Kirk.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Prioritize returning in one piece, Kirk.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's an order.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's an order.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's an order.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, yeah. Copy that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, yeah. Copy that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, yeah. Copy that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Captain.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Captain.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Captain.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's a nice toy you picked up while we weren't around.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's a nice toy you picked up while we weren't around.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's a nice toy you picked up while we weren't around.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You know about this gun, Cuba?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You know about this gun, Cuba?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You know about this gun, Cuba?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's a Chernov rifle that uses large-caliber rounds.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's a Chernov rifle that uses large-caliber rounds.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's a Chernov rifle that uses large-caliber rounds.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Since the Great Purification War, only the Northern Union has dealt with such reckless anti-personnel weapons.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Since the Great Purification War, only the Northern Union has dealt with such reckless anti-personnel weapons.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Since the Great Purification War, only the Northern Union has dealt with such reckless anti-personnel weapons.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Northern Union...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Northern Union...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Northern Union...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. And seeing something like that here gives me a pretty good idea of what this place is all about.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. And seeing something like that here gives me a pretty good idea of what this place is all about.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. And seeing something like that here gives me a pretty good idea of what this place is all about.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This place isn't a forward base built by some company during the exploration days.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This place isn't a forward base built by some company during the exploration days.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This place isn't a forward base built by some company during the exploration days.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's one of the many traces of chauvinism established by those treacherous nationalists.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's one of the many traces of chauvinism established by those treacherous nationalists.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's one of the many traces of chauvinism established by those treacherous nationalists.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you know why scientists who believe they're above everyone else all worship the Northern Union?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you know why scientists who believe they're above everyone else all worship the Northern Union?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you know why scientists who believe they're above everyone else all worship the Northern Union?

root.m_Talk_ENG: They're the only organization that helps realize their twisted ideals.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They're the only organization that helps realize their twisted ideals.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They're the only organization that helps realize their twisted ideals.

root.m_Talk_ENG: They have enough money to build experimental bases in a ditch in the Counterside, and the balls to ignore Administration regulations.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They have enough money to build experimental bases in a ditch in the Counterside, and the balls to ignore Administration regulations.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They have enough money to build experimental bases in a ditch in the Counterside, and the balls to ignore Administration regulations.

root.m_Talk_ENG: They conduct not just human experiments, but also experiment on Artifacts and C.O.s, like Scavengers.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They conduct not just human experiments, but also experiment on Artifacts and C.O.s, like Scavengers.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They conduct not just human experiments, but also experiment on Artifacts and C.O.s, like Scavengers.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's a den of rogues who love delving into things prohibited by the Administration.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's a den of rogues who love delving into things prohibited by the Administration.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's a den of rogues who love delving into things prohibited by the Administration.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do people who work in those places... receive punishment?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do people who work in those places... receive punishment?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do people who work in those places... receive punishment?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Some are behind bars. Like us.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Some are behind bars. Like us.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Some are behind bars. Like us.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But even if they meet a miserable end, I've never seen anyone regret it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But even if they meet a miserable end, I've never seen anyone regret it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But even if they meet a miserable end, I've never seen anyone regret it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Nobody who does that kind of work is sane in the first place.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Nobody who does that kind of work is sane in the first place.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Nobody who does that kind of work is sane in the first place.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Looks like you had someone of that sort by your side too, eh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Looks like you had someone of that sort by your side too, eh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Looks like you had someone of that sort by your side too, eh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I was once in charge of bodyguarding a scientist called Judas at the Northern Union.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I was once in charge of bodyguarding a scientist called Judas at the Northern Union.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I was once in charge of bodyguarding a scientist called Judas at the Northern Union.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But even that psycho, who conducted human experiments, loved his daughter more than anything.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But even that psycho, who conducted human experiments, loved his daughter more than anything.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But even that psycho, who conducted human experiments, loved his daughter more than anything.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's funny.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's funny.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's funny.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A human who disregards life... raising a child.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A human who disregards life... raising a child.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A human who disregards life... raising a child.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But when it came down to it, he pulled the trigger without hesitation when his own daughter became a test subject.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But when it came down to it, he pulled the trigger without hesitation when his own daughter became a test subject.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But when it came down to it, he pulled the trigger without hesitation when his own daughter became a test subject.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And then, when he rationalized his actions by saying that it was all part of the experiment, I got sick of it all.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And then, when he rationalized his actions by saying that it was all part of the experiment, I got sick of it all.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And then, when he rationalized his actions by saying that it was all part of the experiment, I got sick of it all.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I heard he went missing recently. I can only hope he ended up in hell.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I heard he went missing recently. I can only hope he ended up in hell.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I heard he went missing recently. I can only hope he ended up in hell.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry for making this hard on you, Diana.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry for making this hard on you, Diana.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry for making this hard on you, Diana.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I know how tough it is for our daughter to have an irresponsible father who's always out on business trips and can't even drop by the hospital.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I know how tough it is for our daughter to have an irresponsible father who's always out on business trips and can't even drop by the hospital.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I know how tough it is for our daughter to have an irresponsible father who's always out on business trips and can't even drop by the hospital.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The project will soon be completed. When I come back, I'll fulfill my duties as a father that I've neglected until now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The project will soon be completed. When I come back, I'll fulfill my duties as a father that I've neglected until now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The project will soon be completed. When I come back, I'll fulfill my duties as a father that I've neglected until now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: For the happiness of our family... I'll make sure of it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: For the happiness of our family... I'll make sure of it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: For the happiness of our family... I'll make sure of it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Please, just wait a bit more.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Please, just wait a bit more.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Please, just wait a bit more.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I hope so too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I hope so too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I hope so too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: For a scientist who sacrificed his humanity for his ideals... Hellfire would be fitting.
root.m_Talk_DEU: For a scientist who sacrificed his humanity for his ideals... Hellfire would be fitting.
root.m_Talk_FRA: For a scientist who sacrificed his humanity for his ideals... Hellfire would be fitting.
